items.title: Japan prime minister Sanae Takaichi disavows Solana meme coin after it crashes by 75%
items.whyYouShouldCare: The disavowal by Japan's prime minister could undermine confidence in Solana's ecosystem, impacting its reputation and market liquidity.

items.title: Hyperliquid gold perps front-ran CME after Iran strikes and the Monday gap exposed a new weekend leader
items.whyYouShouldCare: The emergence of a new weekend leader in crypto trading could shift liquidity dynamics, influencing how Solana and other assets are traded during off-hours.

items.title: Mastercard adds SoFiUSD as settlement option for card issuers
items.whyYouShouldCare: Mastercard's inclusion of SoFiUSD as a settlement option enhances the usability of digital assets, potentially increasing transaction volumes within the Solana ecosystem.
